title: DarkPvP - Optimized
description: A simple modpack to improve your PVP skills and play together with your friends!
body:
**Tired of boring PvP**? Try this **modpack** and enjoy the **Best PvP experience** with **high performance** and guaranteed **fun** with your friends!

## Main Features

![Optimization And Textures](https://i.ibb.co/F0tm3SV/optimisation-3.png)
Thanks to the mods in the modpack, such as **sodium**, **indium**, **dynamic FPS** and many others (which you can discover!) you can enjoy a **lag-free experience** without sacrificing texture quality and get the best vanilla experience!


The modpack has support for the **highest quality textures** for the best performance!

![Play Together](https://i.ibb.co/dtHnBJb/optimisation-4.png)
Thanks to the **'Essential mod**, you can **host your own worlds** and make them accessible to your friends list! You can change lots of permissions, make them operators and **have fun** with them **without buying a server**!

**Share your screenshots** in the in-game chat with your friends and have fun challenging them for who takes the best screenshots!

Keep up to date directly in the game! You can create and view **your friends' blogs** to see what they are building or their new advancements in a dark-theme interface!

 
# Have Fun! [Created by Legend Team]
